event: Romanesque stone church in Norwegian winter landscape
description: A medieval stone church with a steep pitched roof and a tall pointed steeple sits in a snowy Norwegian landscape. The church is built of rough gray stone with white snow covering the roof. A low stone wall and wooden fence surround what appears to be a small graveyard. Bare winter trees stand to the right. The sky is dramatic with golden sunlight breaking through clouds at the horizon, casting warm light on the snow-covered ground. The overall atmosphere is serene and cold.
